title: Cap Table Strategy in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger cap table strategy in practice judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cap Table Strategy in Practice is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Cap Table Strategy in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cap table strategy in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cap Table Strategy in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
